What the Iran war really cost the US
Breaking down the big numbers and trends that show a fuller picture of how the war affected the US
• Live Updates
Live Updates55 min ago US and Iran take steps to reduce Lebanon conflict and Strait of Hormuz tensions, mediators say
A “de-confliction cell” to end the war in Lebanon and a “line of communication” for the Strait of Hormuz are being set up, with talks in Switzerland to continue. Follow for live updates
• Video 1:32
Video Trump and Vance clash on comments about Iran 1:32
President Trump and JD Vance shared different approaches to Iran as Vance visited Bürgenstock Resort where negotiations are underway, CNN’s Nic Robertson reports.
• Analysis for Subscribers
Analysis for Subscribers Iran shows Trump just how hard making peace will be
Making peace with Iran is going to be just as painful as waging war.
